name: GenderRestrictedSeat
description: 作为依赖策略在随机填充上下文中执行。限制指定座位只能分配给特定性别的学生。性别不匹配时优先重定向到匹配性别的受限座位，无合适座位时请求重掷，重掷耗尽后强制分配并警告。
author: SeatFlow Team

description.zh-CN: 每行配置一个座位及其性别限制。仅选中性别的学生在随机填充时会被分配到该座位，不匹配时优先尝试其他匹配性别的空座。
description.en-US: Each row configures a seat and its gender restriction. Only students of the selected gender may be assigned to this seat; mismatches are redirected to other matching restricted seats first.

GenderRestrictedSeat_Redirected.zh-CN: 学生 {0} 性别不匹配座位 {1}（需 {2}），已重定向到匹配性别的受限座位 {3}
GenderRestrictedSeat_Redirected.en-US: Student {0} gender mismatch for seat {1} (requires {2}), redirected to matching restricted seat {3}

GenderRestrictedSeat_Forced.zh-CN: 重掷次数已达上限，学生 {0}（性别 {1}）被强制分配到只允许 {2} 性别的座位 {3}
GenderRestrictedSeat_Forced.en-US: Reroll limit reached, student {0} (gender {1}) forced into seat {3} (requires {2})
